keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: List of keywords to search LinkedIn posts for.

date.title: Date Range (preset)
date.description: Predefined date range filter. If set and not 'ignore', takes precedence over from/to.

from.title: From date
from.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Only used when date is 'ignore' or not set.

to.title: To date
to.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). Only used when date is 'ignore' or not set.

limit.title: Result limit per keyword
limit.description: Maximum number of posts to scrape per keyword.

li_at.title: LinkedIn li_at cookie
li_at.description: Your LinkedIn session cookie (li_at). Required for authenticated search. Find it in browser DevTools > Application > Cookies > linkedin.com.

use_playwright.title: Use Playwright (browser mode)
use_playwright.description: Use a real browser instead of the HTTP API. Slower but more resilient to rate limiting.

proxy.title: Proxy configuration
proxy.description: Proxy settings. Recommended: use Apify Residential proxies.
